data.title: Secured Finance launches FIL-collateralized stablecoin USDFC to boost the liquidity of the lending market in the Filecoin ecosystem
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Messari's latest quarterly report, in the fourth quarter of 2024, Secured Finance launched the FIL-collateralized stablecoin USDFC based on the Filecoin ecosystem. The stablecoin aims to introduce stability and liquidity support to the Filecoin ecosystem.

USDFC allows FIL holders and storage providers to obtain USD stablecoins using FIL tokens as collateral. This mechanism enables participants to obtain operating funds without having to sell FIL, effectively protecting the value of FIL and maintaining network participation.

The launch of this stablecoin will also significantly enhance the liquidity of the lending market in the Filecoin ecosystem and improve the efficiency of capital utilization in the entire ecosystem. The addition of this innovative financial tool will bring richer financial application scenarios to the Filecoin ecosystem and help promote the further development of the ecosystem.

The launch of USDFC marks an important step for Filecoin in the DeFi field, providing more flexible fund management options for ecosystem participants and injecting new vitality into the entire ecosystem.

data.title: Bitget has launched U-based OBT and EPIC perpetual contracts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Bitget announced that it has launched U-based OBT and EPIC perpetual contracts. Contract trading BOT will be opened simultaneously.

data.title: Ark Invest adds to Coinbase holdings, increasing stake worth $5.2 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Cathie Wood's Ark Invest increased its holdings of Coinbase by 29,353 shares on Thursday, worth about $5.2 million.
In addition, Ark Invest also increased its holdings of Robinhood by 143,855 shares, worth about $5.18 million.
Currently, Coinbase's holdings in the ARKK ETF account for 7.14%, making it the third largest holding. Cathie Wood once said that Ark Invest's investment strategy is to ensure that the holdings of a single stock do not exceed 10% of the fund portfolio.

data.title: RedotPay Completes $40 Million Series A Funding, Led by Lightspeed
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Crypto payment platform RedotPay announced the completion of a $40 million Series A financing round, led by Lightspeed, with participation from HSG, Galaxy Ventures, DST Global Partners, Accel, Vertex Ventures, etc. This round of financing will be used to accelerate the expansion of global crypto payment solutions.
RedotPay was founded in April 2023, and currently has more than 3 million users. It provides seamless cryptocurrency payment and fiat currency conversion services, and is committed to providing convenient financial services for the unbanked population.

data.title: CryptoQuant founder Ki Young Ju: It is too early to assert that we are entering a bear market
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: CryptoQuant founder and CEO Ki Young Ju pointed out that the demand for Bitcoin has stagnated recently, but it is still not enough to judge that the market has entered a bear market.

data.title: Bitcoin Demand Stalls, Market Status Uncertain
data.description: According to Odaily, Ki Young Ju, founder and CEO of CryptoQuant, has observed a recent stagnation in Bitcoin demand. However, he notes that this is not sufficient to determine whether the market has entered a bearish phase.

data.title: In the first quarter of 2025, the US AI sector raised $20 billion, far ahead of the crypto industry’s $861 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Although the crypto market experienced a brief recovery at the end of 2024 driven by the "Trump effect", in the first quarter of 2025, the financing scale of the US artificial intelligence (AI) field still far exceeded the crypto industry.
According to PitchBook data, in the first three months of 2025, the US crypto industry's venture capital was about US$861 million, while the AI ​​field attracted nearly US$20 billion in investment and completed 795 transactions, including Databricks' US$15.3 billion financing and Anthropic's US$2 billion financing.
Data shows that venture capital funds have long been more inclined to AI, and the scale of AI financing has increased from US$670 million in 2011 to US$36 billion in 2020. Only in 2021, crypto financing briefly surpassed AI, but then AI investment quickly overtook it, and the scale of financing in 2024 has exceeded US$100 billion. (CoinDesk)
